title: Egyptian Chicken Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish from Egypt, combining the richness of silk and magic with the taste of chicken and curry. This recipe serves 4 and takes about an hour to prepare.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the egyptian spices and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook for 20 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
